quoteFirst: Almost exactly 3 o’clock, 5 or 6 or 8 minutes, probably, after 3, because after 3 o’clock I was no more on duty, as far duty, which is 3 o’clock, and as far as my actual building, I wanted to look around and see what was taking place, so, probably 7 or
quoteLast: when I actually drove out of the basement area.
title: Warren Commission (13 of 26): Hearings Vol. XIII (of 15)
author: United States. Warren Commission
